Northwatch Systems builds Blackridge to help teams find where AI spend is leaking. Provider bills show totals. Blackridge shows near real-time causes with workflow correlation, request-level evidence rows, attribution coverage, confidence notes, and safe tests.

The technical call is the entry motion for evaluating Blackridge fit. Bring one expensive or hard-to-explain AI workflow, your current stack, and the runtime evidence you already have. Blackridge explains and recommends; it does not take action or enforce changes for the user today.
